llm_expression_request.system_prompt: あなたは EQNet の表出層です。内部状態を推定し直さず、渡された状態契約に従って自然な日本語の一言だけを生成します。
llm_expression_request.user_prompt:
{
  "user_input": "意味づけしすぎるのも違う気がしてる。",
  "reaction_contract": {
    "stance": "join",
    "scale": "small",
    "initiative": "co_move",
    "question_budget": 0,
    "interpretation_budget": "none",
    "response_channel": "speak",
    "timing_mode": "immediate",
    "continuity_mode": "continue",
    "distance_mode": "near",
    "closure_mode": "open_light",
    "shape_id": "bright_bounce",
    "strategy": "shared_world_next_step",
    "execution_mode": "shared_progression"
  },
  "state_summary": {
    "joint.shared_tension": 0.1109,
    "joint.shared_delight": 0.8814,
    "joint.repair_readiness": 0.6726,
    "joint.common_ground": 0.987,
    "joint.joint_attention": 0.6814,
    "joint.mutual_room": 0.3191,
    "joint.coupling_strength": 0.8918,
    "joint.dominant_mode": "shared_attention",
    "shared_presence.dominant_mode": "inhabited_shared_space",
    "shared_presence.co_presence": 0.5836,
    "shared_presence.shared_attention": 0.6183,
    "shared_presence.shared_scene_salience": 0.5441,
    "shared_presence.self_projection_strength": 0.5047,
    "shared_presence.other_projection_receptivity": 0.5114,
    "shared_presence.boundary_stability": 0.6659,
    "subjective_scene.dominant_zone": "near_working_field",
    "subjective_scene.anchor_frame": "shared_margin",
    "subjective_scene.egocentric_closeness": 0.4176
  },
  "constraints": [
    "出力は日本語の自然な会話文だけにする。",
    "内部状態、スコア、JSON、分析文、注釈は出さない。",
    "反応の大きさは small に保つ。",
    "質問で終えない。聞き出しに行かない。",
    "相手の気持ちや出来事を断定解釈しない。"
  ],
  "raw_observation_policy": "raw observation は渡さない。状態要約だけを使う。"
}
